prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Sure, here's a little pep talk for you:

Remember, you're capable of more than you realize. You've overcome challenges before, and you can do it again. This task might seem daunting, but break it down into smaller, manageable pieces and you'll be done before you know it.

Take a deep breath, gather your energy, and dive in. Each step you take will bring you closer to the finish line. You've got this! And remember, the feeling of relief and accomplishment you'll get once you're done is going to be amazing. So, let's do this! You're strong, you're focused, and you're ready to conquer this. Now go out there and crush it!
